events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: this is a **fail / critical risk** — using insulating gloves of the wrong voltage class, or gloves past their stamped retest date, means the primary shock barrier for HV work is unverified. Immediate action is to stop hands-on HV work, reverify absence of voltage, swap in correctly rated and currently-tested gloves (with air-test/inspection), and only then resume.
